info.title: contentsync
info.description: A tool to sync directory contents and avoid touching files with identical content. Read more at https://github.com/KirillOsenkov/ContentSync.

options.name: -c
options.description: Copy files from source that don't exist in destination (left-only).

options.name: -u
options.description:
Update files that have changed between source and destination. This
only overwrites the destination file if the contents are different.

options.name: -d
options.description: Delete right-only files (that are in destination but not in

options.name: -ds
options.description: Delete same (identical) files from destination (that exist in

options.name: -dc
options.description: Delete changed files from destination (can't be used with -u).

options.name: -whatif
options.description: Print what would have been done (without changing anything).

options.name: -q
options.description: Quiet mode. Do not output anything to the console.
